title: Replace Alert.alert with custom ConfirmModal
description: Build a reusable ConfirmModal component and replace all Alert.alert confirmation calls across the app so dialogs work on web and native.
acceptance_criteria: ConfirmModal component exists in src/components/
All Alert.alert calls replaced in ClassDetailScreen
All Alert.alert calls replaced in other screens
Dialogs work on web and native

title: Add recurringClasses Firestore security rules
description: The recurringClasses collection has no Firestore rules. All recurring class operations fail silently in production. Add rules: read for authenticated users, write for isTrainerOrAbove, delete for isHeadTrainer.
acceptance_criteria: recurringClasses read rule exists for isAuthenticated()
recurringClasses write rule restricted to isTrainerOrAbove()
recurringClasses delete rule restricted to isHeadTrainer()

title: Fix classes Firestore delete rule to head_trainer only
description: FIRESTORE_RULES.md line 52 allows isTrainerOrAbove() to delete classes, but DEC-005 restricts delete to head_trainer in the UI. A regular trainer can bypass the UI and delete via direct API. Change to isHeadTrainer().
acceptance_criteria: classes delete rule uses isHeadTrainer() not isTrainerOrAbove()

title: Move Firebase credentials to environment variables
description: Firebase config in src/config/firebase.ts has hardcoded API key and app ID. Convention requires loading from environment. Awaiting clarification on deployment method (Expo Go / EAS) before implementing.
acceptance_criteria: No credentials hardcoded in firebase.ts
Config loaded from environment variables
App still works in dev and prod

title: Surface auth failure to user via toast
description: useAuth.ts catches auth state errors with console.error and silently clears auth. User gets logged out with no explanation. Replace console.error with toast.error().
acceptance_criteria: console.error removed from useAuth.ts
toast.error called with user-facing message on auth failure

title: Write tests for classService and delete flow
description: Zero test files exist. Argus to write tests starting with classService.ts business logic and the delete flow in ClassDetailScreen. Awaiting scope clarification from user.
acceptance_criteria: At least one happy-path and one error-path test per tested unit
classService core functions covered
Delete flow covered

title: Add justification comments to any types in classService.ts
description: mapClass and mapRecurringClass use data: any without a justification comment as required by convention. Add comment explaining Firestore DocumentData is untyped.
acceptance_criteria: Both functions have a comment justifying the any type

title: Replace FAB hardcoded shadow with theme token
description: WeeklyScheduleScreen FAB uses hardcoded shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius. Should use shadows.lg from src/theme/index.ts.
acceptance_criteria: FAB shadow uses shadows.lg from theme
No hardcoded shadow values remain

title: Replace hardcoded micro-spacing values with theme tokens
description: Several StyleSheets use literal 3px and 4px values instead of theme tokens. Files: ClassCard.tsx (marginBottom:3, gap:3), WeeklyScheduleScreen.tsx (paddingVertical:3), LoginScreen.tsx (marginTop:4). Add spacing.xxs:2 to theme if needed.
acceptance_criteria: No hardcoded 3px or 4px values in StyleSheets
Theme updated with sub-xs token if needed
